bmtb-pillpress.name: BMTB Pill Press
bmtb-pillpress.desc: Placeable pill press crafting, pill bottles, use effects, durability, and rotating street demand with trap phone integration.
bmtb-pillpress.fullDesc: Full pill economy for ESX Legacy, QBCore, and Qbox — place a press in the world, craft 10 pill types, fill and withdraw pill bottles, use pills with animations and overdose logic, repair worn presses, roll hot/cold street demand each restart, and tune perks in /pilladmin.
requirements: Optional: bmtb_trapphone for street sell payouts
features: Placeable pill press with ghost placement
Craft 10 pill types with configurable batch size
Pill bottles — fill, open, deposit, withdraw
Pill use animations, stacking, overdose logic
Press durability and repair kit flow
Street demand hot/cold rotation each restart

bmtb-pods-2.name: BMTB PODS 2.0
bmtb-pods-2.desc: Advanced FiveM props/pods system for immersive server interactions.
bmtb-pods-2.fullDesc: Modern AirPods-style music player with live volume control, theme customization, and framework/inventory auto-detection.

bmtb-lean.name: BMTB Lean
bmtb-lean.desc: Full lean workflow — pour, mix, sip FX, and in-world cup carry with custom props and BMTB UI.
bmtb-lean.fullDesc: Pour lean into baby bottles, prep Feyzo soda cups, mix variants (purple / red / green), add ice and extras, drink with sip FX, and carry your cup in-world.
features: Lean bottle to baby bottle pouring
Double cup + Feyzo Cream Soda prep
Sip effects, walk style, and cup HUD
Custom props and BMTB NUI menus

bmtb-gofetch.name: BMTB GoFetch
bmtb-gofetch.desc: Delivery tablet with live shop catalogs, NPC fleet delivery, and multi-framework support.
bmtb-gofetch.fullDesc: Browse live shop catalogs, place orders, pay cash or bank, and receive items through an NPC burrito van courier with optional GoFetch Express upgrades.
features: Live shop catalog from ox_inventory and qb-shops

bmtb-trapphone.name: BMTB Trap Phone
bmtb-trapphone.desc: Full street-trap economy for ESX Legacy — trap runs, deliveries, plugs, rep, and heat.
bmtb-trapphone.fullDesc: Trap phone NUI with calls, messages, deliveries, and Trapperz.net demand index. Run street sales, plug meetups, delivery drops, bagging loops, reputation tiers, and police heat.
features: Trap phone NUI with calls and messages
Street trap runs with buyer spawns
Plug system with trust and meetups
Drug bagging and sellable item loops

bmtb-strippers.name: BMTB Strippers
bmtb-strippers.desc: Full strip club business system — dancer shifts, pole dance, VIP rooms, NPC customers, and owner management.
bmtb-strippers.fullDesc: Run a complete Vanilla Unicorn-style club with dancer shifts, pole dancing, VIP rooms, NPC customers, player lap dances, owner revenue, staff management, reputation, and club popularity.
features: Dancer shifts with pole dancing routines

bmtb-chains-as-items.name: BMTB Chains As Items
bmtb-chains-as-items.desc: Wearable chain items with inventory/shop integration for ESX/QBCore.
bmtb-chains-as-items.fullDesc: Wearable chain system with inventory and shop flow. Includes item setup support for modern FiveM frameworks and clean, simple integration.

watermark-server-logo-script.name: Watermark Server Logo Script
watermark-server-logo-script.desc: Simple server logo watermark display script for FiveM servers.
watermark-server-logo-script.fullDesc: Lightweight overlay script that displays your server logo and keeps branding visible while players are in-game.

bmtb-loading-screen.name: BMTB Loading Screen
bmtb-loading-screen.desc: Premium animated loading screen with customizable branding support.
bmtb-loading-screen.fullDesc: Animated loading experience with clean transitions and customizable branding blocks for your server identity.

bmtb-cooking.name: BMTB Cooking
bmtb-cooking.desc: Interactive cooking/crafting gameplay system for roleplay servers.
bmtb-cooking.fullDesc: Roleplay-focused cooking and crafting system with configurable recipes and progression-ready gameplay loops.
features: Ghost placement for pot and cup

bmtb-weapon-repair.name: BMTB Weapon Repair
bmtb-weapon-repair.desc: Weapon repair bench system with immersive crafting and repair flow.
bmtb-weapon-repair.fullDesc: Bench-based repair mechanics with configurable costs and immersive interactions for realistic server economy gameplay.

bmtb-wigs.name: BMTB Wigs
bmtb-wigs.desc: Wig/hair inventory system with clothing integration and UI support.
bmtb-wigs.fullDesc: Inventory-backed wig system with appearance handling and framework-compatible integration hooks.

bmtb-chopshop.name: BMTB Chopshop
bmtb-chopshop.desc: Vehicle chopshop gameplay with immersive roleplay mechanics.
bmtb-chopshop.fullDesc: Vehicle dismantling and chopshop progression flow built for immersive roleplay and risk/reward gameplay.

bmtb-tuning.name: BMTB Tuning
bmtb-tuning.desc: Audio/tuning customization system for immersive vehicle upgrades.
bmtb-tuning.fullDesc: Customization-focused tuning setup designed to improve vehicle identity and immersive server car culture.

bmtb-car-wipe.name: BMTB Car Wipe
bmtb-car-wipe.desc: Vehicle wipe/cleanup utility script for FiveM administrators.
bmtb-car-wipe.fullDesc: Admin utility resource to clean up unused vehicles and keep performance stable across server sessions.

bmtb-recycle-job.name: BMTB Recycle Job
bmtb-recycle-job.desc: Beginner-friendly recycling side hustle with foreman NPC, sorting, and cash payouts.
bmtb-recycle-job.fullDesc: Clock in at the yard, grab boxes, sort recyclable material, and sell for cash. Supports ESX, QBCore, and Qbox with ox_lib menus, carry animations, and configurable locations and payouts.

bmtb-givecar.name: BMTB Givecar
bmtb-givecar.desc: Vehicle giveaway and ownership transfer utility script.
bmtb-givecar.fullDesc: Simple and reliable vehicle ownership assignment utility for staff workflows and giveaways.

bmtb-nocrosshair.name: BMTB NoCrosshair
bmtb-nocrosshair.desc: Lightweight no-crosshair immersion script for realistic combat.
bmtb-nocrosshair.fullDesc: Minimal script that removes crosshair UI for improved realism and roleplay-focused combat feel.

bmtb-itemslist.name: BMTB ITEMSLIST
bmtb-itemslist.desc: Clean item list viewer for ESX/QBCore inventory systems.
bmtb-itemslist.fullDesc: Item browser and quick lookup page for inventory systems so players and staff can view available items easily.

bmtb-moneywash.name: BMTB Moneywash
bmtb-moneywash.desc: Dirty money washing system with ESX, QBCore, and Qbox support.
bmtb-moneywash.fullDesc: Money wash script with progress UX and framework support across ESX, QBCore, and Qbox, designed for realistic economy loops.
